models.name: Detailed Mars Colony
models.description: A large futuristic Mars research station with habitats, reactor, hangar, portal, tower, solar equipment, rover and terrain details.

models.name: Citadel Castle
models.description: A fortified stone castle with towers, gatehouse, courtyard and battlements.

models.name: Astra Star Cruiser
models.description: A long-range exploration cruiser with swept wings, cockpit and engine cluster.

models.name: Glass Ridge House
models.description: A modern two-story residence with pool, garage, terraces and glass walls.

models.name: Velocity GT Racer
models.description: A low-slung endurance race car with aerodynamic bodywork and oversized wheels.
